headline: Local Gym Introduces 'Judgment-Free Zone' Where People Who Don't Exercise Can Sit And Judge Others
summary: The 'Go Nowhere Gym' offers comfortable seating, popcorn machines, and judgmental commentary on everyone's form.
fullBody: The Go Nowhere Gym has opened in Los Angeles with a unique concept: a judgment zone where non-exercisers can sit comfortably while critiquing the workout efforts of others. The facility features comfortable couches, popcorn machines, and a sound system playing 'encouraging commentary' about everyone's form. The gym's slogan is 'Why work out when you can watch others work out and feel superior about your choice?' Personal trainers serve as 'commentary hosts' who narrate workouts like sports events. One visitor said, 'I came for the free WiFi and stayed for the incredible judgments. That man doing deadlifts has terrible form, and I've never felt more validated.' The gym also offers a subscription service for 'remote judgment,' where people can livestream workouts from home and receive professional commentary.
imagePrompt: People sitting on couches eating popcorn while watching others exercise, commentator with microphone pointing at weightlifter, comic illustration, flat design, purple and orange colors
